agent.claudeCodeModeDesc: Inherit Claude Code configuration and system prompt when enabled

workspace.defaultHint: If no default workspace is set, new sessions will use this directory
workspace.workspaceHint1: Workspaces specify the working directory for Agent command execution.
workspace.workspaceHint2: New sessions will use the default workspace.
workspace.clickToAdd: Click the button above to add
workspace.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete workspace "{{name}}"?

shortcuts.clickShortcutArea: Click the shortcut area, then press a new shortcut combination to change

about.title: About Amon
about.intro: Amon is a smart AI Coworker running locally, built on the Claude Agent SDK. It doesn't just chat with you — it can actually help you get work done: writing code, running commands, searching information, and managing files.
about.feature1Desc: A smart assistant that can execute tasks, manage files, and run code — not just a chatbot
about.feature2Desc: Data stored locally, protecting your privacy and security
about.feature3Desc: Extend functionality through the Skills system to adapt to different work scenarios
about.feature4Desc: Provides a friendly graphical interface experience for Claude Code
about.dataDirectoryDesc: Session records and settings files are stored in the local config directory.

provider.name: Name
provider.providerDesc: Configure multiple AI service providers and select one to use
provider.confirmDeleteProvider: Are you sure you want to delete provider "{{name}}"?
provider.apiUrlHint: Only Claude-compatible API endpoints are supported
provider.providerHint1: Providers configure API connection information for AI services.
provider.providerHint2: Click the "Enable" button to set it as the current provider.
provider.clickToAdd: Click the button above to add

skills.skillsDesc: Skills are folders containing SKILL.md files that extend Claude's capabilities. System Skills are located at ~/.claude/skills, workspace Skills are in each workspace's .claude/skills directory.
skills.recommendedDesc: Officially recommended Skills. Click the install button to add to your system or workspace.
skills.systemSkillsAvailable: System Skills are available for all sessions
skills.workspaceSkillsAvailable: Workspace Skills are only available within that workspace
skills.uninstallConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{name}}?
skills.uninstallConfirmDetail: This will delete all files for this Skill.
